creator: numbski@hksilver.net
text:
Sadly, your explanation is correct - and has been a known issue for a 
while that should be explained in the port documentation.  The 
workaround is to create symlinks to locations that *are* showing up, 
then they get backed up.

This is a problem with the binary provided by Veritas as supported in 
linux-on-freebsd.  There's quite literally nothing I can do to fix it. :(

Newer versions of be_agent need to be torn apart in a far different 
manner from this one in order to get them working.  I created this port 
in 2004 while working for a company that desperately wanted to be able 
to backup their FreeBSD-based data center with Backup Exec, and this was 
the result.  I'm no longer in a Backup Exec environment, and currently I 
don't even have an up-to-date FreeBSD server to work against, and likely 
won't again for quite a while.

I am sorry - please try the workaround and see if it works for you.  Let 
me know how it goes.

Tony Shadwick
